title: Pushing My AI Dark Factory to Its Limits with Opus + Kimi Combined
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates combining Claude Opus for deep reasoning and planning tasks with Kimi K2.6 for implementation and validation in an autonomous coding agent system. The hybrid approach optimizes token efficiency by routing computationally hard steps to the stronger model while keeping faster models for routine tasks.
